title: Architecture Exploration
description: Explore how DrissionPage 4.2 Phase 1 fits into the existing project architecture. Map module boundaries, files touched, and what must remain out of scope. Use .workflow/roadmap.md Phase 1 as source of truth.
findings: Phase 1 只钉实迁移约束，不进入大规模代码改写。触点：pyproject.toml/uv.lock、main.py、autobrowser.py、use_system_user.py、README.md、CLAUDE.md。最高风险是 autobrowser.py 私有 MixTab 导入；main.py Edge 可评估 edge=True，但其它浏览器路径不改；userscript、域名扩展、并发/随机延迟策略均 out of scope。

title: Implementation Exploration
description: Explore current DrissionPage usage and 4.2 API differences. Identify concrete probes needed for imports, public Tab types, ChromiumOptions methods, click.middle, new_tab, and use_system_user_path.
findings: 需探测 DrissionPage 版本、Chromium/ChromiumOptions 可导入、公开 Tab 类型、ChromiumOptions.set_browser_path(edge=True)、Chromium.new_tab(hidden=...)、click.middle 返回值、wait.eles_loaded/scroll/run_js/close、use_system_user_path().save()。私有导入 DrissionPage._pages.mix_tab.MixTab 只用于类型标注，应在后续迁移前确认公开替代或使用 Protocol/Any。

title: Dependency Exploration
description: Explore pyproject.toml, uv.lock, uv pre-release behavior, and lock consistency requirements for DrissionPage 4.2. Identify exact dependency-update decisions that execution must make.
findings: pyproject.toml 仍是 drissionpage>=4.1.1.1，uv.lock 已锁 4.2.0b3，root metadata 仍旧约束。推荐执行阶段把直接依赖改成 drissionpage>=4.2.0b3,<4.3 或必要时 ==4.2.0b3，并用 uv lock/sync 的 prerelease 策略重算。验证 uv.lock package version、root requires-dist、uv lock --check、最小导入命令。

title: Risk Exploration
description: Explore migration risks and verification needs. Include beta-version risk, real browser smoke boundaries, local browser path/login state risk, and non-impact to userscripts.
findings: 4.2 是 beta，需记录实际版本和回退策略。真实浏览器风险包括本机浏览器路径、登录态和 click 行为变化；Phase 1 的 smoke 应尽量无破坏，只做导入/配置/签名探测，真实打开 linux.do 和 1 个主题可留到 Phase 2/3。userscript 不受 DrissionPage 影响，最多保留 node 检查作为后续防误伤。

title: Plan Generation
description: Generate plan.json and .task/TASK-*.json for roadmap Phase 1: dependency and API difference confirmation for DrissionPage 4.2. Consume all exploration findings, keep task count 1-3, and write outputs under .workflow/scratch/20260514-plan-P1-drissionpage-42-dependency-api.
findings: 已生成 2 个任务：先固化 DrissionPage 4.2 beta 依赖约束并重算 lock，再执行无破坏 API/签名探测和迁移清单。计划不进入 Python 调用迁移；真实 linux.do 浏览器 smoke 留到 Phase 2/3。
